content.en:
Soon after, those Fourth Realms also knew that the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Pagoda was gone, and those Heavenly Pass Orders had become waste.

Many Fourth Realms are discussing who exactly has obtained the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, and there are different opinions, but there is no accurate goal.

And Ye Tian, who had obtained the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, silently returned to his residence in the 4,500th Territory, and then began to study the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower silently.

"Master!"

The machine spirit of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower appeared and said respectfully to Ye Tian.

"Xiao Guan, where is the treasure of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Master, it's in the deepest part of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate. "The machine spirit Xiaoguan gave Ye Tian a guide to the position.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's soul will passed through the layers of dimensions of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, and finally found that position.

Suddenly, a large number of treasures appeared in his perception.

"There are so many treasures!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Even the innate multi-dimensional treasures, he actually found dozens of them, as well as a large number of resource treasures.

Because there were so many treasures, he didn't know how to organize them for a while.

"Take your time!"

Ye Tian classified these treasures one by one, put them together that were temporarily useless to him but were very precious, put together ordinary material treasures, and focused on storing and subdividing the treasures that were useful to him.

Then.

The machine spirit Xiaoguan appeared and introduced: "Master, the three most important treasures of the previous master are these three. The first one is the black ball, which is a dimensional rule. "

"What is a dimensionally rule-of-the-art thing?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Machine Spirit Xiaoguan explained: "Master, you have already comprehended a dimensional rule, you should be very aware of the power of a dimensional rule, once you reach a dimensional rule, if you want to continue to comprehend, the general way will not work, and it is almost impossible to progress." The object of the dimensional rules is a treasure born in the eleventh dimension, which can assist in the comprehension of the dimensional rules. It's a pity that once this kind of dimensional rule treasure is used to comprehend, it will be gradually consumed, and the owner used to have a lot of dimensional rule things, but they have all been consumed, only this one is left, and it has been consumed by half. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian looked at this dimensional rule treasure and showed a look of longing.

That's a good thing!

Then, the machine spirit Xiaoguan continued: "This second treasure is the silver scroll, this is the treasure left by a certain Sixth Realm existence, called the Silver Mist Axis, which records six supreme supreme learnings, one of which is the Four Realms Supreme Learning, the four Five Realms Supreme Learning, and the Six Realms Supreme Learning. "

"Can the supreme mastery be recorded?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes, it can be recorded. The machine spirit Xiaoguan explained: "This is the special feature of the Silver Mist Axis, of course, the supreme mastery on this is not suitable for the master, the real supreme mastery needs to be comprehended by himself, but with this silver mist axis, the master can more easily comprehend his own Five Realms Supreme Learning." The previous master was able to create the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Sword by himself because of it, otherwise the previous master's talent would not have been able to comprehend the Supreme Skill of the Five Realms like the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Sword. "

"Good stuff!"

Ye Tian held this silver mist axis and couldn't put it down!

Then, the machine spirit Xiaoguan introduced the third treasure: "The third treasure is this branch-multi-dimensional silver fir tree, in fact, the original multi-dimensional silver fir was a complete multi-dimensional silver fir tree, but it was snatched away by the enemy of the previous owner, and only this small branch remained. Its function is to assist in refining the soul will, and the previous master relied on it to raise the soul will to the eleventh dimension, but now, it can only raise the master's soul will to the limit of the tenth dimension, and it is more difficult to step into the eleventh dimension. "

The three treasures introduced by the Instrument Spirit Xiaoguan are undoubtedly the most precious of the three treasures, and the treasures that can be used by him, and there are some other treasures, some of which can assist in the impact of the sixth realm, but they are of little use to him now, and the value is actually not high, after all, even the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord has not used these things to impact the sixth realm, so it can be seen that the probability of improvement is not high.

After a while, Ye Tian sorted out all these treasures.

Next, he had to face a major matter, and that was to impact the fifth realm.

He wasn't prepared to attack on the side of the 4,500 Territory, it was too easy to be discovered, and once he was discovered, those Fifth Realms would guess that he had captured the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and maybe the Fifth Realm would attack him and destroy his promotion.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to be promoted on the side of the Five Thousand Territory.

Subsequently.

He left from the Sword Corridor and went back with these treasures, after all, he needed a lot of resources to impact the Fifth Realm, so he naturally needed these resources.

......

Territory No. 5311.

This is the new headquarters of the Terrans.

Ye Tian was here to impact the Fifth Realm.

He first arranged some formations, and then he began to attack the fifth realm.

One dimensional rule, 100% breakthrough to the fifth realm.

I saw that Ye Tian stabilized the extra-dimensional realm in his body with a one-dimensional rule, and then began to promote the extra-dimensional realm, thus turning the super-dimensional realm into a one-dimensional void.

This is also the perfect way to break through!

After the other fourth realms hit the fifth realm, the extradimensional realm in the body is only a half-step dimensional void, and it is necessary to comprehend the superdimensional rules step by step, so that the half-step dimensional void can quickly transform into a real dimensional void.

However, there are not many Fifth Realms that have really achieved this step, and most of the Fifth Realms have not yet comprehended a dimensional rule, and they cannot transform the extradimensional realm in their bodies into a dimensional void.

Ye Tian directly turned the extradimensional realm in his body into a dimensional void, and the process was extremely easy.

Boom!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, and once the transformation was completed, his body was the body of the dimension, and he could easily cross the tenth dimension.

He constantly devoured all kinds of treasure resources to accelerate the transformation of his body.

One extradimensional epoch after another has passed.

During this period, the human race was far away from Ye Tian's retreat, and they all knew that the old ancestor was impacting the higher realm, so they didn't dare to disturb.

Ye Tian is not afraid of the fourth realm on this side of the No. 500 territory to disturb him, not to mention that the human race has a fourth realm, he has other replica bodies, who dares to disturb, that is, looking for death!

Before you know it, a hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

A terrifying aura spread from the Terran headquarters, affecting the entire Five Thousand Three Hundred and Eleven Territory, and even to other Realms.

Suddenly.
